title: Feuilleea benthamiana
taxonomy: Feuilleea benthamiana is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. It belongs to the genus Feuilleea, which is a group of plants native to Australia. The Celastraceae family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the staff vine family. This family comprises around 60-70 genera and approximately 950 species worldwide. Feuilleea benthamiana is considered to be a rare and endemic species in Australia.
